port_required: Select a receive serial port before starting detection
gps_data_port_required: Select a GPS NMEA data port
developer_not_configured: Developer TOTP secret is not configured
developer_invalid_code: Developer TOTP code is invalid or expired
network_backend_unavailable: NetworkManager/nmcli is not available, cannot configure interfaces
network_interface_unmanaged: This interface is not managed by NetworkManager
